application_uri.description: The globally unique identifier for the application instance, as of OPC-UA.

opcua_servers.description: Mapping of machine identifier to corresponding OPC-UA server configuration.

pki_dir.description: The root directory of the OPC-UA PKI.

MessageSecurityMode.description: A copy of [`opcua::crypto::MessageSecurityMode`] to allow using serde remote functionality.

OpcUaServerConfig.description: The configuration for an OPC-UA server to communicate with.

password.description: The password to use if using username/password authentication.

traceability.description: The traceability settings for this server.

user.description:
The username if authenticating to the OPC-UA server with username/password.
If not provided, anonymous authentication will be used.

SecurityPolicy.description: A copy of [`opcua::crypto::SecurityPolicy`] to allow using serde remote functionality.

TraceabilityConfig.description: Traceability related configuration for an OPC-UA server.

namespace_url.description: The namespace URL used for traceability.

publish_interval.description: The publish interval to request when subscribing to request variable.

request_node_id.description: The node identifier of the request variable.

response_node_id.description: The node identifier of the response variable.
